sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ngram (id Int32, haystack String, needle String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) AS match_score FROM test_ngram WHERE match_score >= 0.5;
SELECT id, ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) AS match_score FROM test_ngram WHERE ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, 'gдеёзд') = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_ngram WHERE ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) = 0 AND haystack IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, haystack FROM test_ngram WHERE haystack LIKE '%g%' AND ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) > 0.2;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_ngram WHERE ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) BETWEEN 0.3 AND 0.8 GROUP BY id HAVING count(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id Int32, matching_id Int32, haystack String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (1, 1, 'abcdefghij'), (2, NULL, 'ghij'), (3, 2, 'xyz'), (4, 1, NULL);
SELECT j.id, ngramSearchUTF8(j.haystack, n.needle) AS score FROM test_join j JOIN test_ngram n ON j.matching_id = n.id WHERE score IS NOT NULL;
SELECT j.id, ngramSearchUTF8(j.haystack, 'xyz') AS search_score FROM test_join j WHERE ngramSearchUTF8(j.haystack, 'xyz') > 0.1 GROUP BY j.id HAVING search_score < 0.8;
